news.paragraph: Airbnb is facing mixed news as Argus Research raised its price target from $145 to $165 while maintaining a Buy rating. This positive analyst outlook is countered by a recent SEC filing showing an insider sold shares worth approximately $8.85 million. There are no immediate earnings or regulatory catalysts mentioned in the current headlines.
headlines: Airbnb Insider Sold Shares Worth $8,853,375, According to a Recent SEC Filing
Argus Adjusts Price Target on Airbnb to $165 From $145, Maintains Buy Rating
